name: First Bank
description_short: First Bank's Ketchikan, AK location at 331 Dock St offers retail banking services to Southeast Alaska residents.
description_long:
First Bank operates a full-service branch at 331 Dock St in downtown Ketchikan, AK. This standalone facility serves the Ketchikan area. While specific hours aren't listed online, contact the location directly to confirm when it's open for in-person banking.

This Ketchikan First Bank branch provides standard retail banking services including checking and savings accounts, loans, and deposit services. For more information about services available at this location, inquire directly at the branch in downtown Ketchikan.

As a Ketchikan resident, this downtown location on Dock St offers convenient access for your banking needs without traveling to a neighboring community. Bring your government-issued ID and account information when visiting. First Bank has been serving Southeast Alaska communities for years, making this Ketchikan branch a reliable option for local banking.
services: Personal savings accounts and money market accounts
Mortgage loans including construction and home equity products
Personal loans and personal lines of credit
Auto loans, boat loans, RV loans, and land loans
Business loans including commercial real estate and equipment financing
Online and mobile banking with bill pay
pros: FDIC-insured deposits with full government backing
Multiple checking account options designed for different customer needs (student, income-based, value-focused)
Specialized loan products for Alaska residents including commercial fishing loans and boat construction loans
Accessible digital banking through online platform, mobile banking, and Zelle payments
Community involvement programs including development grants and charitable giving
Local branch presence across six Southeast Alaska communities
Comprehensive mortgage products including home construction and accessory dwelling unit loans
cons: Limited geographic availability—serves only Southeast Alaska locations, not accessible to out-of-state customers
No indication of competitive rates or rate comparisons with national banks
Limited information about fees, minimum balances, or account requirements on primary website
best_for: Alaska residents in Southeast communities seeking local relationship banking
Small business owners and commercial fishing operations in Alaska service areas
Homebuyers in Alaska needing specialized mortgage products like construction and ADU loans
Customers preferring physical branch banking combined with digital access
diagnosis: First Bank is best for Alaska residents in Southeast communities who value local relationship banking and need standard consumer or business banking products. The critical caveat is geographic limitation—this bank only serves specific Alaska towns and is not accessible to customers in other states or regions.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
meta_description: Ketchikan, AK First Bank at 331 Dock St. Full-service banking.
